action.reasoning: Iteration 6 attempted to import RecurrentPPO but it's not available in base SB3. RecurrentPPO would require sb3-contrib and custom Dict policies, which adds complexity. Given baseline PPO multi-task (5M steps) gave near-zero success rate, likely due to task interference and insufficient steps per task. Decision: switch to per-environment PPO models without recurrence. Train each environment separately for 500k steps (5M total, same as before but with dedicated models). This should reduce interference. Update predict.py to load per-env models (remove RecurrentPPO dependency). Train for 5M steps across all envs, submit eval. If still poor, will consider recurrence and longer training per env later.
